case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. MARIO TORREA ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TORREA, MARIO DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-26-2015
DECLARATION OF REDUCED FILING FEES PURSUANT TO CAL.BUS. & PROF. CODE % 6322.1(C)(1) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TORREA, MARIO $1,289.40 PRINCIPAL, $181.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,470.40, DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF $100 DUE ON THE 25TH OF EACH MONTH.
